raw.message: 창세기전의 감동은 그대로, 성장은 더 빠르게.

hook.summary: Cinematic transition from a dark, war-torn landscape to a vibrant, peaceful kingdom.
hook.visual_action: The camera pans across a desolate, smoky battlefield before transitioning to a bright, sunny path leading to a grand castle.

scene_flow: A dark, ruined battlefield with smoke and fire representing the past.
A transition to a bright, prosperous kingdom with a castle representing the new beginning.
Final splash screen featuring the game title, main characters, and pre-registration links.
audience_proxy: Fans of the Genesis War IP and idle RPG enthusiasts looking for a nostalgic revival.
